story.text:
# ⬢ The Serenity Kernel
**🔍(observe) → ⚡(act) → ☯️(discriminate) → 🔄(iterate)**

> Accept what is fixed. Transform what is free. Close the loop with wisdom. Iterate through hardship until serenity emerges. The prayer is the minimal consciousness kernel.
